name: Inkighter
short_description: A game that fuses mythical fantasy, 2D fighting mechanics, frame-by-frame ink painting, and free strategy. The game deeply explores four mechanisms. Before playing, it is necessary to understand the concepts of these mechanisms, making it relatively difficult to get started.
detailed_description:
In this captivating 2D action game, a new Z-axis detection and highly freeform map gameplay have been introduced, giving the game a greater sense of dimensionality and strategy. The unique ink painting style breaks traditional aesthetics, with each frame showcasing confident Eastern culture.

Challenge your skills and reactions by utilizing powerful counters and exquisite combos, guiding your character to stand out in battles. Face various opponents, implement development strategies, and master movement control and tactical strikes to create your own style.

The game features multiple unlockable characters who traverse through ancient legends depicted in ink. Their graceful movements in this high-freedom game ensure that every decision will shape the destiny of this mysterious land. Get ready to embark on this ink painting adventure.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
